allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npx, python, py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($p = 'C:\\Users\\Ponsh\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\DIARIO\\To-do\\index.html'; $c = Get-Content $p -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $old = '.replace\(/[' + [char]0x0300 + '-' + [char]0x036F + ']/g, ""\)'; $new = '.replace\(/[̀-ͯ]/g, ""\)'; if \($c.Contains\($old\)\) { $c = $c.Replace\($old, $new\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false\)\); 'reemplazado' } else { 'no encontrado' })
